label: File Upload (Embed)
description: Upload content for chunking + embedding into a Milvus collection via the platform's /api/files/embed endpoint.

settings.name: content
settings.label: Content
settings.description: Raw content to embed. If unset, falls back to upstream input (input.content / input.text / raw string).

settings.name: metadata
settings.label: Metadata
settings.description: Free-form metadata attached to every chunk. JSON string or object.

ai.shortDescription: Embed file content into a Milvus collection.
ai.whenToUse: When the workflow has document content (loaded, generated, or transformed) that should be searchable later via RAG.
ai.examplePrompt: embed the cleaned doc text into the 'support-docs' collection with chunkSize=1024
ai.promptHints: Reference output via {{steps.<id>.result.chunkCount}}. Falls back to upstream input.content if no content set on the node.
